During this task, on each trial you will see a letter presented, a short break, and then a second letter. For instance, you may see an "A" followed by an "F".

If the first letter was an "A" AND the second letter is an "X", press your middle finger. Otherwise, press your index finger.

We'll start with a practice round. During practice, you will receive feedback and a reminder of the rules. These will be taken out for the test, so make sure you understand the instructions before moving on.

Remember, press your middle finger after you see "A" followed by an "X", and your index finger for all other combinations.

Try to respond as quickly and accurately as possible.
